summary: Bullish trend continuation after BSL sweep above ATH 30,776. Price at 30,920 in uncharted territory. Extreme premium + contract roll risk Thu. Wait for pullback to 30,776 support flip or NY KZ entry.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: Bullish continuation. D1 HH/HL from Jun 9 SSL sweep 28,204 → 30,920 (+9.6%). BSL swept above ATH 30,776. Macro trend intact (price > all MAs). BUT: extreme premium >100% of old DR, new ATH territory with no overhead reference.
ict_analysis.h4_context: H4 DR stale (price at 255%+). Prior ATH 30,776 now potential support (polarity flip). Bullish FVGs stacked below: 30,165-30,198, 29,744-29,957. Need pullback to 30,776 or FVG for valid entry. No CRT purge confirmed yet.
ict_analysis.m15_status: No Kill Zone active (London passed, NY not started). Price in uncharted territory above ATH. No M15 OB formed at key level. Entry status: WAIT for NY KZ (13:00-16:00 UTC) + pullback to support.

risks.event: No overhead reference in ATH territory

recommendation: WAIT. Bullish trend but no valid entry setup. Need: (1) Pullback to 30,776 support flip + M15 OB in NY KZ, OR (2) BSL sweep + rejection (Turtle Soup). Contract roll risk Thu makes positioning risky. Confidence reduced due to MT5 data unavailability.
